response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:26: Identified as a static slide with event information; no vocal music. 2. 00:26-01:13: Identified as venue/audience shots with background instrumental music; no vocal music. 3. 01:13-05:00: Identified as a monologue/announcement segment by Hoshimachi Suisei; background instrumental music only, no vocal music detected. 4. Confirmed no vocal music throughout the entire segment.
response.global_summary: This video is a pre-show announcement segment featuring a static text slide, followed by shots of the concert venue and audience, and finally a monologue by Hoshimachi Suisei addressing the crowd. No vocal musical performances are featured.

scenes.description: A static text slide providing information about the Hoshimachi Suisei live concert.
The concert venue showing the audience with glowsticks. Instrumental background music is playing.
Hoshimachi Suisei talks to the audience, giving announcements and rules for the concert. Instrumental background music is playing.
